name: Surfside Beach
description: Most convenient beach for cruise passengers with limited port time. Plane spotting possible — aircraft approach nearby.

rockiness.beach: White sand near the Oranjestad waterfront 🏖️

characteristics.depth_profile: Shallow sandy slope near Oranjestad waterfront.
characteristics.access: ~15 minute walk from Aruba cruise terminal; taxi from Oranjestad
